'''dhangate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:omnivorously|omnivorously]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ng-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:omnivorously|omnivorously]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhangate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dhangate|dhangate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhangatesher|dhangatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhangatesherĂ«m|dhangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhangatero|dhangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhangateshĂ«|dhangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhangateshĂ«m|dhangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhangatero|gokidhangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhangateshĂ«|gokidhangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhangateshĂ«m|gokidhangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhangankerom|godhangankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhangankeshĂ«|godhangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhangankeshĂ«m|godhangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhangankeya|godhangankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhangaterom|dhangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhangatemu|dhangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhangateya|dhangateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhangaterom|gokidhangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhangatemu|gokidhangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhangateya|gokidhangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhangangate|dhangangate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhangangatesher|dhangangatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhangangatesherĂ«m|dhangangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhangangatero|dhangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhangangateshĂ«|dhangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhangangateshĂ«m|dhangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhangangatero|gokidhangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhangangateshĂ«|gokidhangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhangangateshĂ«m|gokidhangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhangangankerom|godhangangankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhangangankeshĂ«|godhangangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhangangankeshĂ«m|godhangangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhangangankeya|godhangangankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhangangaterom|dhangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhangangatemu|dhangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhangangateya|dhangangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhangangaterom|gokidhangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhangangatemu|gokidhangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhangangateya|gokidhangangateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhĂŠngĂŠte|dhĂŠngĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhĂŠngĂŠtesher|dhĂŠngĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m|dhĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠngĂŠtero|dhĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|dhĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|dhĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠngĂŠtero|gokidhĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|gokidhĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidhĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhĂŠngĂŠnkerom|godhĂŠngĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«|godhĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godhĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhĂŠngĂŠnkeya|godhĂŠngĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠngĂŠterom|dhĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠngĂŠtemu|dhĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhĂŠngĂŠteya|dhĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠngĂŠterom|gokidhĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠngĂŠtemu|gokidhĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠngĂŠteya|gokidhĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhafngafte|dhafngafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhafngaftesher|dhafngaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafngaftesherĂ«m|dhafngaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafngaftero|dhafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhafngafteshĂ«|dhafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafngafteshĂ«m|dhafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafngaftero|gokidhafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhafngafteshĂ«|gokidhafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafngafteshĂ«m|gokidhafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhafngafnkerom|godhafngafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhafngafnkeshĂ«|godhafngafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhafngafnkeshĂ«m|godhafngafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhafngafnkeya|godhafngafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafngafterom|dhafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafngaftemu|dhafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhafngafteya|dhafngafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafngafterom|gokidhafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafngaftemu|gokidhafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhafngafteya|gokidhafngafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
